zh.Dyrham, South Mimms, Middlesex, England: 英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry De DURHAM於1253年出生在英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯時，他的父親William de Durham23歲，母親Sabine21歲。他於1275年與Joan在英國米德萊可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1315年之前在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.Dyrham, South Mimms, Middlesex, England: 英国米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry De DURHAM于1253年出生在英国米德萊可素斯 米姆斯时，他的父亲William de Durham23岁，母亲Sabine21岁。他于1275年与Joan在英国米德萊可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1315年之前在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: DURHAM
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the city of Durham, recorded as Dunholm in 1056 and Duram in 1297, named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ (see Down 1) + late Old English holm (from Old Norse holmr ‘island’).

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

variants.name: Derham
meanings: English: habitational name from Dearham in Cumbria, East and West Dereham in Norfolk, or Dyrham in Gloucestershire, named from Old English dēor ‘deer’ + hām ‘settlement, homestead’, or hamm ‘enclosed land, water meadow’.
Irish (mainly Dublin, Drogheda, and Cork): of English origin, but MacLysaght takes this to be a variant of   Durham  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry De DURHAM was born in 1253, in South Mymms, Middlesex, England, his father, William de Durham, was 23 and his mother, Sabine, was 21. He married Joan in 1275, in Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 1315, in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry De DURHAM est né en 1253, à South Mymms, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, William de Durham, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sabine, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan en 1275, à Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1315, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry De DURHAM 1253 in South Mymms, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Durham 23 und seine Mutter Sabine 21. Er hat 1275 in Middlesex, England Joan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1315 in London, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry De DURHAM è nato il nel 1253 nel South Mymms, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, William de Durham, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Sabine, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joan nel 1275, nel Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1315, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry De DURHAMが1253年にイギリスミッドレセックスソウス ムインムズで生まれた時，父William de Durhamは23歳，母Sabineは21歳であった。1275年にイギリスミッドレセックスでJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1315年以前にイギリスイギリスロンドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry De DURHAM(이)가 1253년 영국 미들레세스 소우스 마이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Durham(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Sabine(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1275년 영국 미들레세스에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1315년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry De DURHAM nasceu em 1253, em South Mymms, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Durham, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sabine, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan em 1275, em Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1315, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry De DURHAM родился в 1253 г. в местности соут миммс, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Durham было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sabine, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan в 1275 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1315 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry De DURHAM nació en 1253, en South Mymms, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Durham, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sabine, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joan en 1275, en Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1315, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
